semantic.role: Type definition module centralizing configuration interfaces and enums for the ArchSpine mirror system.
responsibilities: Re-exports the core SpineConfig type from the protocol layer for use within the config domain.
Defines the BooleanSettingResolution interface to model the resolution source and value of boolean settings.
Defines literal union types for system behaviors: HookSyncMode and ArtifactStrategy.
Exports a SupportedConfigKey type (implied by structural skeleton) to enumerate valid configuration keys.
invariants: Pure TypeScript type definitions and interfaces; no executable code.
Serves as a central source of truth for configuration-related types across the system.

changeIntent.architecturalIntent: Provide a stable, centralized type contract for configuration across the ArchSpine system, decoupling type definitions from implementation.

Exports a SupportedConfigKey type to enumerate valid configuration keys.
